item.title: 50-foot ancient snake discovered in India may be one of the largest ever
item.description: A massive prehistoric snake discovered in India may rank among the largest ever to slither across Earth. Named Vasuki indicus, this ancient giant live...

item.title: A one-in-a-million supernova seen five times could reveal the Universe’s true speed
item.description: A spectacular cosmic event nicknamed “SN Winny” could help solve one of astronomy’s biggest mysteries: how fast the universe is expanding. This rare s...

item.title: Scientists just found the Milky Way’s edge and it’s closer than expected
item.description: Scientists have uncovered the true boundary of the Milky Way’s star-forming region using stellar “age mapping.” They found a telltale U-shaped pattern...

item.title: Scientists catch antimatter “atom” acting like a wave for the first time
item.description: Quantum physics once shocked scientists by revealing that particles can behave like waves—and now, that strange behavior has been pushed even further....
